impacts.statement: The entire town of Walnut Grove is underwater.
Extensive agricultural flooding is occurring with several thousand acres underwater.
Several hundred acres of agricultural land are underwater.
Agricultural land along the river is flooding.
Agricultural land and low areas along and near the river begin to flood.

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
